name: Midas Hyperithm ETH
redeem: Open-ended tokenized debt security. Redemption may be requested at any time via a Tokenholder Redemption Request Form, subject to onboarding/KYC, with redemption value based on best-efforts liquidation of the underlying strategy and paid in wETH after fees. OTC/secondary exits may depend on market liquidity.
notes: Underlying is a crypto-denominated market-neutral yield strategy using spot, lending, arbitrage, derivatives, and token rewards. Official KID classifies risk as 7/7 and notes issuer/strategy/liquidity risks and no capital protection.
